# The Van Guide — llms.txt
# The most comprehensive van builder directory in the US
# https://thevanguide.com

## About
The Van Guide is an independent directory of van conversion companies across the United States. We catalog builders by state, city, van platform (Sprinter, ProMaster, Transit), conversion style, price tier, and services offered. Our goal is to help people find the right van builder for their project. No paid placements — every listing is editorially maintained.

## Directory — Main
- /builders/: Full US van builder directory (searchable, filterable)
- /services/: Van repair and service shop directory

## Directory — By State
- /builders/california/: California van builders
- /builders/colorado/: Colorado van builders
- /builders/oregon/: Oregon van builders
- /builders/utah/: Utah van builders
- /builders/arizona/: Arizona van builders
- /builders/texas/: Texas van builders
- /builders/washington/: Washington van builders
- /builders/florida/: Florida van builders
- /builders/north-carolina/: North Carolina van builders

## Directory — By Platform
- /builders/platform/sprinter/: Mercedes Sprinter van builders
- /builders/platform/promaster/: Ram ProMaster van builders
- /builders/platform/transit/: Ford Transit van builders

## Directory — By Price Tier
- /builders/tier/budget/: Budget van conversion builders
- /builders/tier/mid/: Mid-range van conversion builders
- /builders/tier/premium/: Premium van conversion builders
- /builders/tier/luxury/: Luxury van conversion builders

## Directory — By Build Style
- /builders/style/custom/: Custom van conversion builders
- /builders/style/standard/: Standard van conversion builders

## Directory — By Service
- /builders/service/off-grid/: Off-grid van builders
- /builders/service/solar/: Solar installation van builders
- /builders/service/electrical/: Electrical system van builders

## Insurance Guides
- /insurance/: Van conversion insurance hub (pillar guide)
- /insurance/best-for-van-conversions/: Best insurance for van conversions
- /insurance/cost/: How much van conversion insurance costs
- /insurance/diy-van-conversion/: Insurance for DIY van conversions
- /insurance/during-the-build/: Insurance during the conversion process
- /insurance/full-time/: Insurance for full-time van life
- /insurance/rental-insurance/: Rental insurance for converted vans
- /insurance/rvia-and-insurance/: How RVIA certification affects insurance
- /insurance/switching-auto-to-rv/: Switching from auto to RV insurance
- /insurance/total-loss/: Total loss claims on converted vans
- /insurance/address-and-domicile/: Address and domicile for van insurance
- /insurance/overview/: Van conversion insurance overview

- /insurance/carriers/usaa/: USAA van insurance review
